project_intent.name: Onboarding email sequence refresh
project_intent.content:
## Goal
Refresh the three-step onboarding email sequence so new users reach the first useful action within one session.

## Constraints
Keep the existing email provider. No new tracking domains.

final_issues.title: Draft refreshed copy for onboarding emails 1-3
final_issues.assignment: Write replacement copy for the three onboarding emails.
final_issues.output: Three approved email drafts checked into the content folder.
acceptanceCriteria: Each email names the single next action the user should take
Copy fits the existing template slots without layout changes

final_issues.title: Wire refreshed copy into the email provider templates
final_issues.assignment: Update the provider templates with the approved drafts.
final_issues.output: Updated templates live behind the existing send schedule.
acceptanceCriteria: Test sends render correctly in the provider preview
No new tracking domains are introduced

judge_fixture_input.project_update_markdown:
run_id: fixture-run-0001
Decomposed the onboarding email refresh into two sequenced issues: copy first, template wiring second.
